nasb.text: He who digs a pit may fall into it, and a serpent may bite him who breaks through a wall.

esv.text: He who digs a pit will fall into it, and a serpent will bite him who breaks through a wall.

cnv.text: 挖陷阱的，自己掉進去；拆牆垣的，有蛇來咬他。

ccb.text: 挖掘陷阱的，自己必掉在其中； 拆围墙的，必被蛇咬；

csbs.text: 挖掘陷坑的，会掉在其中； 拆毁围墙的，会被蛇咬。
